text: fat is 100g. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for this category, the real question is fat quality.
carbs is 0g. everything else is kind of whatever. not relevant here.
protein is 0g. everything else here is pretty flat. also not relevant here.
vitamin e at 93% DV, vitamin k at 50% DV, vitamin a at 0% DV stand out most. that gives this food real vitamin support.
minerals are basically not part of the case here.

the upsides first. excellent oils-and-fats category fit because this is the cleanest flagship example of a strong fat-profile food in the category. contains useful polyphenols because adds value beyond the core fat chemistry alone. very simple ingredient identity because a clear wholefood-adjacent advantage over more industrial fat products.

on the weaker side. extremely energy dense because still pure fat, so calories accumulate fast. quality varies a lot because source and authenticity matter in practice. easy to overpour without noticing because a healthy image can make portion creep happen fast in practice.
S tier. Best in controlled amounts where fat quality is the main reason to use it.
